purpose: Identify the exact Lean theorem surfaces needed after AP16AR selected the pair-sign producer hierarchy as the production route.

public_translation_bridge.name: Cuboctahedron.Generated.Translation.KilledBridge
public_translation_bridge.shape: forall {r : Fin numPairWords} {mask : SignMask}, translationEarlyFamilyClassOfChoice r mask = TranslationFamilyClass.needsFarkas -> totalLinearOfPairWord (unrankPairWord r) = matId -> Coverage.TranslationCaseKilled r mask

existing_smoke_root.note: The current split producer smoke root only imports chunks and proves a True build marker. It does not yet export the production membership bridge.

next_step: Generate or hand-write a small nonempty membership root that uses private source and row producers to prove Translation.KilledBridge on the sampled range, then generalize that layout to the AP16AO production hierarchy.
safety: No broad Lean build was run during this inspection.
